title: 23.75'' x 41.75'' Round Glass Cocktail Table with Chrome Base
features: Your guests will mingle and your event venue will thrive when you purchase our round, glass table that stands 41.75'' in height.
It's the perfect dimensions for resting a drink or meal while it can also act as a display for flowers or other decorative items to make your event memorable.
Features include a chrome base and glass top and simple assembly.
